subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! God willing, mayest thou hold fast unto the truth and remain detached and free from all else save Him. These are momentous days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله انشاء الله بحق متمسک باشی و از ماسویه فارغ و آزاد ایام ایام
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment
